name: KleinClaw
description: Kleinanzeigen helper tools for a local kleinanzeigen-bot setup with redacted output.

cliPath.description: Path or command name for the local kleinanzeigen-bot executable.

workingDirectory.description: Directory where the bot should run when no config path is set.

configPath.description: Optional path to the bot config. Tool output redacts this path.

adRoots.description: Trusted roots for adConfigPaths and adDirectories scoped operations.

workspaceMode.description: kleinanzeigen-bot workspace mode. Defaults to portable.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum runtime for one bot command.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum sanitized stdout or stderr characters returned to the model.

approvalMode.description: Approval behavior. Defaults to all tools; use mutating for local status/verify smoke checks.
